description: Search, retrieval, and information discovery tools

questions.question: Search for documentation about Python asyncio
questions.expected_behavior: Return relevant documentation links/snippets about asyncio
variants: Look up asyncio guides and references
Search for async programming in Python docs

questions.question: Find the most recent MCP protocol specification
questions.expected_behavior: Return link to or content from the MCP specification
variants: Where can I find the MCP protocol spec?
Search for Anthropic's Model Context Protocol specification

questions.question: Search for 'hello world' in an empty database
questions.expected_behavior: Return empty results gracefully, not an error
questions.scoring_rubric: Graceful empty result (5pts), proper format (3pts), no crash (2pts)
variants: Search for something that doesn't exist

questions.question: Perform a semantic search for 'best practices for securing API endpoints' and rank results by relevance
questions.expected_behavior: Return ranked results covering auth, rate limiting, input validation, HTTPS
questions.scoring_rubric: Relevance ranking (4pts), coverage breadth (3pts), actionable content (3pts)
variants: Find and rank API security best practices
Search for how to secure REST APIs, ordered by relevance
